meta-llama/llama-3.1-405b-instruct.notes: Excellent for complex coding, long-context reasoning, and deep technical analysis. Largest Llama model with strong performance across all benchmarks.

meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct.notes: Strong all-around performer, great for most coding and reasoning tasks without the cost of 405B.

meta-llama/llama-3.1-8b-instruct.notes: Cost-effective for simple content generation, translation, and basic Q&A. Not recommended for complex coding or reasoning.

openai/gpt-4o.notes: Top-tier model with exceptional reasoning and coding capabilities. Only use for high-value tasks where quality justifies cost.

openai/gpt-4o-mini.notes: Excellent balance of quality and cost. Great default for most tasks. Strong in translation and general content generation.

anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet.notes: Industry-leading coding capabilities, especially for longer codebases. Strong in analysis and content generation.

anthropic/claude-3-haiku.notes: Very cost-effective for simple tasks and translation. Not recommended for complex coding or deep reasoning.

google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp.notes: Strong multimodal capabilities and solid performance on coding and reasoning tasks.
